emails.subject: Gisb / Master
emails.body: Gisb Master Please forward our ENA GISB draft and the SAMPLE Master to Brad Dixson with short transmittal letter. bdixson@kgas.com. The company is Kansas Gas. Please bcc: Bryant Fryhart me. Thanks Debra Perlingiere Enron North America Corp. Legal Department 1400 Smith Street, EB 3885 Houston, Texas 77002 dperlin@enron.com Phone 713-853-7658 Fax 713-646-3490

emails.subject: Re: Gisb / Master
emails.body: Re: Gisb Master Debra, I e-mailed the forms to Brad. However, I can't locate Bryant Fryhart's e-mail address. Please let me know if you have that address. Majed Nachawati Enron North America Legal Department 1400 Smith Street Houston, Texas 77002 Majed.Nachawati@enron.com 713-345-2722 DD 713-646-3393 Fax
